Yayinin Adi: Towards Generalizable Deepfake Detection with Spatial-Frequency Collaborative Learning and Hierarchical Cross-Modal Fusion
Uygulanan Yontem: Block-wise DCT + Cascaded Multi-scale Conv (3x3, 5x5, 7x7) + Scale-invariant Differential Accumulation + Hierarchical Cross-Modal Fusion (Shallow Attention + Deep Dynamic Modulation)
Basari Metrikleri: FF++ c23: 97.43% Acc / 99.58% AUC; FF++ c40: 91.77% Acc / 94.21% AUC; Cross-data Celeb-DF v2: 74.68% AUC; DFDC: 73.71% AUC
